name: profile-review-narrowing
description: Synthetic fixture for profile-review prompts that need narrow evidence planning instead of broad chat scanning.
source_prompts: review how I prompt for PR/dogfood work, but don't scan everything
keep the profile review cheap and focused

golden_profile.default_intent: The user wants a targeted prompt-style review for a specific work pattern, not a full local-history recalibration.
golden_profile.preferred_autonomy: Plan and rank evidence first, then review the selected snippets if they are sufficient.
golden_profile.evidence_standard: Use source paths, line numbers, snippet counts, and token estimates.
golden_profile.scope_preference: Narrow PR/dogfood evidence only; broaden only if the selected evidence is too thin.
golden_profile.communication_style: Report the evidence plan and token savings before the profile conclusions.

add_by_default: Run the evidence planner with a total token budget.
Use selected snippets before broad sources.
Show broad versus narrow token estimates.
ask_before: Broad-scanning all memories or session logs.
avoid: Using private raw chat excerpts in public output.

rough_prompt: use profile review for how i prompt on pr dogfood stuff, dont scan all chats
golden_rewrite: Use $prompt-profile-review to review how the user prompts for PR/dogfood work, but do not broad-scan all chats by default. First run `python3 skills/prompt-profile-review/scripts/plan_review_evidence.py ~/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md --goal "review how I prompt for PR/dogfood work" --budget 5000` or the equivalent path-specific command. Use the ranked selected snippets as the initial evidence set, report broad versus narrow token estimates, and broaden to rollout summaries or sessions only if the selected evidence is too thin. Produce the standard prompt profile plus a compact Prompt-Rewrite Handoff, with source paths and line numbers but no long raw private excerpts.
